metadata.task_title: Compress a JPG to a smaller size
metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 90.jpg in Documents > Task 90 folder on Photos app. Reduce the image size to 40%
metadata.context: I have a picture but is too large to share as an email attachment. I need a smaller JPEG.

l3.rationale: Ctrl+L focuses the address bar.

l4.rationale: Uses File Explorer's address bar to go to Documents\Task 90 and open the folder containing the target image.

l5.rationale: Typing/searching, list selection, and window navigation together locate Task ID 90.jpg in Documents > Task 90 and open it in Photos.
